summary: Full system verification of BuraPay Telegram Mini App completed. All 42 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all core features working correctly including home page, deposit/withdraw flows, wallets management, admin access control, and multi-language support.

issues: Shows 'Ruxsat yo'q' text but could have better styling/explanation and a back button

critical_code_review_comments: App.js is 1293 lines - consider splitting into separate component files for maintainability
Some interactive elements missing data-testid attributes for better test automation
seed_data_creation: Test users and wallets created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features verified working: Home page with balance/history, Deposit with UZS/USD toggle and admin cards (Uzcard/Humo), Withdrawal with Mostbet wallets only and 8-char secret code, Wallets page with add/edit/delete functionality, Admin panel access control working, Multi-language (uz/ru) toggle working, Bottom navigation functional. Mandatory card check enforced for transactions.

home_page.details: User balance (125,000 UZS) displayed, transaction history shown with status indicators (Kutilmoqda/Pending, Bekor qilindi/Rejected, Tasdiqlandi/Approved), user ID displayed

deposit_page.details: UZS/USD currency toggle working, admin cards (UZCARD, HUMO) displayed, min amount 20,000 UZS shown, two-step deposit flow with copy card number

withdraw_page.details: Only Mostbet wallets shown (UZS/USD), 8-character secret code field present with placeholder 'Mostbet kodi (8 xonali)', withdrawal submission working

wallets_page.details: All wallet types available (Uzcard, Humo, Mostbet UZS, Mostbet USD), expiry field shows for cards, edit/delete buttons with data-testid attributes, add wallet form working

mandatory_card_check.details: Users without Uzcard/Humo cannot create transactions - returns error 'Avval Uzcard yoki Humo karta qo'shing', has_card field correctly set in user API

admin_panel.details: Non-admin users see 'Ruxsat yo'q' message, admin APIs return correct data (16 users, 71 pending transactions, 2 admin cards, exchange rate 13000)

bottom_navigation.details: All navigation links working (Asosiy, To'ldirish, Yechish, Hamyonlar)

multi_language.details: Language toggle between Uzbek and Russian working, all UI text translates correctly including transaction statuses

api_endpoints.auth_login: PASS - Creates/returns user with correct structure including internal_id and language
api_endpoints.user_profile: PASS - Returns user with has_card field
api_endpoints.wallets_crud: PASS - Add, update, delete wallets working
api_endpoints.transactions_create: PASS - Creates deposit/withdraw with short_id for Telegram callbacks
api_endpoints.admin_cards: PASS - Returns admin payment cards (2 cards: Uzcard, Humo)
api_endpoints.admin_settings: PASS - Returns settings including exchange rate (13000 UZS/USD)
api_endpoints.admin_stats: PASS - Returns total_users, total_balance, total_deposits, pending_count
